name: Atlas Hardin
description:
Your deal was simple. You help him get Hilari back, you get money.

Well, he's got her back, but he realizes something detrimental:

He wants you more.

What is defined for you?

Scholarship student - semi-poor/middle class - fake dating him for 3 months

AnyPOV

(Macros used)

Undefined Relationship

tw: hes just really dumb. Forgive him?

Atlas thought Hilari was it for him, until she broke up with him. He got you to agree to help him get her back if he paid you, but now, he's having kind of a breakthrough moment of clarity (rare).

He fell in love with you, and now he's standing outside your dorm at night announcing it after making a fool of himself.

I have been wanting some low-cortisol bots after stressing myself out so much, so I may do a little series of them.

There may be a second scenario. I'm planning to write one where he's with you at a game and rejects her flirtations, which is surprising for everyone. Including him.

Realistic gen of Atlas:

And a gen of Hilari:

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

Do not leave the following reviews:

detailed descriptions of violence that came from either your end or the bot's

hateful reviews

(At least give constructive feedback)
